title: Create Style Sophisticated Backpacks
body:
## **Create Style Sophisticated Backpacks**

**_Sophisticated Backpacks but Creatified!_**  

***

A Resource Pack that makes [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) look like one of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod's items!
